analysis: The last two nights are doing something really interesting — you hit 7h 34m and then 7h 56m back to back, with awake time basically collapsing to under 20 minutes, and that 2h 34m of REM on the most recent night is genuinely impressive. Earlier in the stretch you were sitting in the low sixes with some rough awake windows, that 1h 47m of broken sleep on the 1st being the obvious sore spot, so the turnaround into the back half of the week is real and worth noticing. Your deep sleep has actually dipped as the totals grew — 50-51 minutes early on versus 32-36 minutes in the last two nights — so that's the one thing worth keeping an eye on even as everything else trends up. Whatever you did to get those final two nights, you're allowed to feel smug about it.
